data.title: Silver Pegasus units to begin separate trading on Nasdaq
data.description:
• Silver Pegasus Acquisition (NASDAQ:SPEG) announced that unit holders can begin separate trading of shares and rights starting September 8, 2025.
  • The company completed its IPO on July 16, 2025.
  • Class A ordinary shares will trade under the symbol “SPEG”, and rights under “SPEGR”.
  • Unseparated units will continue trading under the symbol “SPEGU”.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Tradeweb reports strong August performance with $2.5T in average daily volume
Tether expands gold investment strategy with $100M boost in Elemental Altus Royalties stake - report
data.description:
• Stablecoin (SBC-USD) issuer Tether Holdings SA is said to be deepening its gold investment strategy by boosting its stake in a Canadian gold royalty company. 
  • Tether plans to buy approximately $100 million in additional shares of Elemental Altus Royalties (OTCQX:ELEMF), a firm that specializes in buying revenue streams from mining companies, according to a Bloomberg News report.
  • The stablecoin issuer wants to invest in the entire gold mining supply chain and has held talks with both mining and investment groups on how to go about its plan, the Financial Times reported.
  • Tether had already amassed a 37.8% stake earlier this year, a filing in June showed.

data.title: Nano One Materials launches C$15M ATM equity program
data.description:
• Nano One Materials (OTCPK:NNOMF) has entered into an equity distribution agreement with Canaccord Genuity and Roth Canada to establish an at-the-market equity issuance program.
  • Pursuant to the agreement, the company may distribute up to C$15M of common shares in the capital of the company from time to time through agents.
  • The company currently intends to use the net proceeds, if any, to fund ongoing operations.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: ESGold announces brokered LIFE offering for gross proceeds of up to C$5 million
data.description:
• ESGold (OTCPK:ESAUF) has entered into an agreement with Red Cloud Securities to act as sole agent and bookrunner in connection with a "best efforts" private placement for the sale of up to 6,666,667 units of the company for gross proceeds of up to C$5,0
  • The company intends to use the net proceeds of the offering for the advancement of its flagship Montauban Project in Québec as well as for general working capital and corporate purposes.
  • SMFTF -0.21% premarket to $46.07.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: BILL Holdings gains after report of Starboard stake; may push for board changes (update)
data.description:
Update 8am on Sept. 5: Adds BILL comment. 

BILL Holdings (NYSE:BILL) rose .6.5% in after-hours trading after a report that activist investor Starboard Value has a stake and may run a proxy fight for board seats at the financial automation software company.

Starboard, which has an 8% stake in BILL, has been building its position since the stock price fell recently, according to a  Reuters report on Thursday, which cited people familiar with the matter. The activist is expected to make a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as its holding exceeds the 5% threshold. 

Four of BILL's 12 directors will stand for election at this year's annual meeting, and Starboard may nominate as many as four before the Saturday deadline, according to the report. It wasn't known what other plans Starboard may have for BILL. 

"The perspectives of all BILL shareholders are important to us, and members of BILL’s management team have talked with Starboard’s representatives since they recently contacted us about their investment," BILL said in a statement  late Thursday. "We intend to engage with Starboard to understand their views as we do with other shareholders."

Starboard couldn't be reached for comment by Reuters.  

Shares of BILL have dropped 45% this year.

data.title: Smith & Wesson Brands declares $0.13 dividend
data.description:
• Smith & Wesson Brands (NASDAQ:SWBI) declares $0.13/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 6.33%

data.title: C2 Blockchain surpasses 400M DOG coin milestone
data.description:
• C2 Blockchain (OTCPK:CBLO) now holds 400.17M DOG coins, exceeding 80% of its treasury goal.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Starbucks attracts bids for its China business valuing it at close to $5 billion
data.description:
Bids are in from interested parties looking to acquire a part of Starbucks Corporation's (NASDAQ:SBUX) China business, according to Reuters. Sources indicate that the bidding round values the China business as high as $5 billion, which is below the level that early reports indicated a sale could be struck.

By comparison, Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) has a total market cap of $98.9 billion, and Luckin Coffee's (OTCPK:LKNCY) market cap is $11.9 billion.

Starbucks (SBUX) has not committed to selling the China business as a whole and could retain a meaningful stake. The list of bidders for the business includes KKR (KKR), Carlyle, EQT, Hillhouse Capital, Primavera Capital, Bain Capital, and Chinese tech giant Tencent Holdings (TCHEHY) (OTCPK:TCTZF).

Starbucks (SBUX) opened its first store in China in January 1999 in Beijing. Initial expansion involved joint ventures and licensing agreements, including partnerships with local entities like Beijing Mai Da Coffee and Uni-President Group. By the 2010s, Starbucks (SBUX) launched an aggressive expansion strategy, growing store count rapidly. As of June 30, 2025, Starbucks (SBUX) had 7,828 stores in China.

data.title: Lightwave Logic expands sales presence in Asia via partnership with Photonteck
data.description:
• Lightwave Logic (NASDAQ:LWLG) Friday announced the expansion of its sales and distribution network in Asia through a strategic partnership with Photonteck.
  • The addition of sales and technical support resources is a crucial step in further strengthening the company's position in the manufacture and sale of electro-optic polymers for silicon photonics applications.
